title: CenterPoint Energy declares regular Common Stock dividend of $0.1900
text: HOUSTON, April 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ — CenterPoint Energy, Inc.’s (NYSE: CNP) Board of Directors today declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.1900 per share on issued and outstanding shares of Common Stock payable on June 8, 2023, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on May 18, 2023.
